texts.orig: Low Season Special Offer : 1 night free on accommodation only will be included for bookings of 4 to 7 nights Extended Stay Discounts: 25% off for bookings of 8 to 14 nights | 30% off for bookings of 15 to 27 nights Discounts apply to accommodation only and are not applicable over Peak Season Long Stay Discounts: for bookings of 28 nights or more, please enquire for specific rates and additional T&Cs

texts.orig: Facilities | Services | Amenities
texts.text: Facilities | Services | Amenities

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Reception & Concierge Services
texts.text: Reception & Concierge Services

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Lantana Galu Beach, our staff is there to make your stay as enjoyable as possible. Our reception is open 24 hours a day and offers a concierge service for bookings of a wide range of services including water sports, excursions, taxis, tuk-tuks and restaurants.
texts.text: At Lantana Galu Beach, our staff is there to make your stay as enjoyable as possible. Our reception is open 24 hours a day and offers a concierge service for bookings of a wide range of services including water sports, excursions, taxis, tuk-tuks and restaurants.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Le Café Diani Restaurant & Bar | Room Service
texts.text: Le Café Diani Restaurant & Bar | Room Service

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Situated by the main swimming pool, relax with stunning views of the beach and all-day service at the restaurant, in the gardens or by the swimming pool. Enjoy a divers à la carte and in-house Room Service Menu .
texts.text: Situated by the main swimming pool, relax with stunning views of the beach and all-day service at the restaurant, in the gardens or by the swimming pool. Enjoy a divers à la carte and in-house Room Service Menu .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Convenience Shop
texts.text: Convenience Shop

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located by Reception, the shop sells a variety of sundry grocery items that can also be ordered in advance. In addition, you will find an array of other local and international items.
texts.text: Located by Reception, the shop sells a variety of sundry grocery items that can also be ordered in advance. In addition, you will find an array of other local and international items.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Private Chef
texts.text: Private Chef

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A private chef can be sourced for guests upon request depending on availability. Charges for the chef are usually settled directly between guests and the chef.
texts.text: A private chef can be sourced for guests upon request depending on availability. Charges for the chef are usually settled directly between guests and the chef.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Weddings & Celebrations
texts.text: Weddings & Celebrations

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For up to 300 guests, we can cater for weddings and parties with tailor-made menus backed by our team of experienced and dedicated staff renowned for offering exemplary service.
texts.text: For up to 300 guests, we can cater for weddings and parties with tailor-made menus backed by our team of experienced and dedicated staff renowned for offering exemplary service.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Honeymoon Package
texts.text: Honeymoon Package

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our Honeymoon Package includes a 30 minute spa treatment for 2, a seafood dinner for 2 at Le Café with a bottle of sparkling wine and flowers in your suite or villa. Minimum 3 nights' stay or 7 nights over Peak Season. Proof of marriage required.
texts.text: Our Honeymoon Package includes a 30 minute spa treatment for 2, a seafood dinner for 2 at Le Café with a bottle of sparkling wine and flowers in your suite or villa. Minimum 3 nights' stay or 7 nights over Peak Season. Proof of marriage required.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Baby Cots & High Chairs
texts.text: Baby Cots & High Chairs

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Baby cots and high chairs for children can be provided at no extra charge upon request and subject to availability.
texts.text: Baby cots and high chairs for children can be provided at no extra charge upon request and subject to availability.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Beach Side & Garden Swimming Pools
texts.text: Beach Side & Garden Swimming Pools

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The main leisure pool, a step away from the beach, offers the ideal space for sunbathing, relaxation and leisure which also includes a paddling pool for children. The garden swimming pool offers a quieter area to sunbathe and relax by the water and includes a paddling pool for children.
texts.text: The main leisure pool, a step away from the beach, offers the ideal space for sunbathing, relaxation and leisure which also includes a paddling pool for children. The garden swimming pool offers a quieter area to sunbathe and relax by the water and includes a paddling pool for children.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Fitness & Massage
texts.text: Fitness & Massage

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Lantana Gym , comprising a large airy room with light parquet floor and mirrors is fully equipped with the latest fitness machines. The gym is open all day for residents to use freely. Adjacent to the gym is the massage & beauty studio offering relaxing treatments and therapies to include: holistic massages, aromatherapy facials, nail therapies, hairdressing and much more.
texts.text: The Lantana Gym , comprising a large airy room with light parquet floor and mirrors is fully equipped with the latest fitness machines. The gym is open all day for residents to use freely. Adjacent to the gym is the massage & beauty studio offering relaxing treatments and therapies to include: holistic massages, aromatherapy facials, nail therapies, hairdressing and much more.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Business Centre
texts.text: Business Centre

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located adjacent to the reception, the business centre offers printing, scanning, photocopying and an internet connection.
texts.text: Located adjacent to the reception, the business centre offers printing, scanning, photocopying and an internet connection.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Barbeques
texts.text: Barbeques

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Barbeque sets can be provided at no extra charge upon request and subject to availability (villas and plunge pool suites only).
texts.text: Barbeque sets can be provided at no extra charge upon request and subject to availability (villas and plunge pool suites only).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: WiFi
texts.text: WiFi

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are high-speed wireless internet connections which can be accessed at no extra charge throughout the property.
texts.text: There are high-speed wireless internet connections which can be accessed at no extra charge throughout the property.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Water Sports, Activities & Excursions
texts.text: Water Sports, Activities & Excursions

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lantana Galu Beach is within close proximity to Diani's water sport centres. Activities can be booked via reception to includ e: diving, snorkelling, kite surfing, windsurfing, glass bottom boat, deep sea fishing, dolphin safaris, jet skiing, quad biking, cycling tours...
texts.text: Lantana Galu Beach is within close proximity to Diani's water sport centres. Activities can be booked via reception to includ e: diving, snorkelling, kite surfing, windsurfing, glass bottom boat, deep sea fishing, dolphin safaris, jet skiing, quad biking, cycling tours...
